projectDescription: A lightweight, open-source Android calculator app with scientific mode, customizable themes, and calculation history, downloaded over 300,000 times.
keyFeatures: Lightweight APK (~2MB) with no unnecessary permissions
Custom algebra engine built from scratch (no third-party math library)
Scientific mode with trigonometric, logarithmic, and factorial functions
Dark, Light, Amoled, and Material You themes
Calculation history with swipe-to-delete and configurable size
Quick Settings tile for instant access from notification shade
Available on locked screen without unlocking
International and Indian numbering system support
Available on Google Play, F-Droid, and IzzyOnDroid
publicApiSurface: Expression.getCleanExpression(calculation: String, decimalSeparatorSymbol: String, groupingSeparatorSymbol: String): String
NumberFormatter.format(text: String, decimalSeparatorSymbol: String, groupingSeparatorSymbol: String, numberingSystem: NumberingSystem): String
